prestazioni: Engine: N74B66 6.6L Twin-Turbo V12 (660hp stock) – Full billet CNC ported cylinder heads with custom 28.5mm titanium intake valves and 24.5mm Inconel exhaust valves by **Mahle Motorsport**, paired with **Ferrea F15 Series** competition valve springs and **Titanium retainers** for 8,500 RPM capability.

Forced Induction: **Garrett GTX5533R Gen II** turbochargers (1.28 A/R, 88mm compressor wheels) with **Precision Turbo 6266** wastegates, **PTP 4.0-inch titanium downpipes**, and **AEM Infinity 10** standalone ECU with **Motec PDM30** power distribution module for precise fuel and ignition mapping under 2.2 bar boost (stock: 1.1 bar).

Drivetrain: **ZF 8HP95X** 8-speed transmission reinforced with **Sonnax billet valve body** and **FTX Racing Stage 4 torque converter** (4,500 RPM stall), paired with a **Quaife ATB differential** and **GKN VL300** carbon-fiber driveshafts to handle 1,100Nm of torque (stock: 900Nm).
estetica: Body: **Liberty Walk LB-RR Cullinan** widebody kit with **custom 3D-printed ABS composite fenders** (2.5-inch wider front, 3-inch wider rear), **Vorsteiner V-RT carbon fiber front splitter**, and **Rocket Bunny GT-style rear diffuser** with integrated **Aeromotions active rear wing** (adjustable via hydraulic actuators).

Wheels: **HRE FF16** forged monoblock wheels (23x12.5 ET25 front, 23x13.5 ET15 rear) wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R** tires (345/25R23 front, 355/20R23 rear) with **BBS Motorsport** center-lock adapters and **AP Racing 6-piston calipers** (420mm rotors) behind a **Vorsteiner V-SE carbon fiber brake duct kit**.

Interior: **Recaro Pole Position** carbon-Kevlar bucket seats with **Schroth 6-point harnesses**, **MOMO Prototipo** steering wheel (380mm, Alcantara with **AiM MXL2** data display), and **Rolls-Royce Bespoke** hand-stitched **Hydes Leather** (color-matched to **Ferrari Rosso Corsa**) with **Alcantara headliner** and **Brembo GT** pedal set.
